text.title: Vector DB Security — Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes by compliance regime to required hardening level.

decision-tree.root-question: Does corpus contain PII or regulated data?

conclusion.verdict: Maximum hardening: BAA, encryption at rest, audit log, PHI handling, erasure ≤6d
Auth + TLS + private + encryption + audit + erasure SLA ≤30d
Auth + TLS + private + audit + access review quarterly
Baseline: auth + TLS + private; encryption + audit recommended
